expectations.evidence: CSV contains all 33 KWCAG items + 7 semantic HTML items. Each item has a result classification.

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: Items 10/11: 'div onClick에 키보드 이벤트 핸들러(onKeyDown), tabIndex, role 미제공' and '클릭 가능한 div에 tabIndex 없어 키보드 초점 불가'

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='card-item' when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: Item 32: 'Card.tsx:27 — id="card-item" 하드코딩, 리스트 렌더링 시 동일 id 중복'

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: All issues mapped to numbered items (1-33) and semantic items (시맨틱-1 through 시맨틱-7)

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Every ❌ and ⚠️ item includes specific fix guide with code examples
